issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' with a condition checking that attack deals damage to opponent's Life, not just HasRestingDon. The current DSL only checks for DON!! presence, not damage dealt.

Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Card text says 'trash 7 cards from the top of your deck' — this should be 'ForceDiscard' or a deck-trash action, not hand-trash. TrashFromHand targets hand; the effect targets deck.
Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect for same reason — should trash from deck, not hand.
Both actions are marked optional ('you may') but DSL has no 'optional' flag indicated. Verify DSL format supports optionality markers if needed.
